title: ophrys vernixia subsp. innominata
intro: Ophrys vernixia subsp. innominata, a lesser-known sub-species of the Ophrys vernixia, is a type of orchid that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ophrys vernixia subsp. innominata are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
